title: Myth1c's Bananas
description: converts apple variants and hunger bars names and textures  into bananas (compatible with Appleskin)
body:
This texture pack converts apples,its golden and enchanted variants and hunger bar textures to bananas. Not much to be said yet i think this could help players with banana themed skins such as me add a part of themselves to their world.
(Pack is compatible with Appleskin)
